languages.text: "Вероятно, это последствия многолетней практики среди генеторов". {n}Хирургеон с искренней печалью вслушивается в заунывные звуки бинарного гимна, исполняемого техноматами для поддержания жизни в древней машине.{/n} "Я научился у них многому в ремесле врачевания, а после того, как очутился в Секторе Бионика... моим наставником стал машинный дух, обитающий в этой реликвии".

traits.locale_text: "Вероятно, это последствия многолетней практики среди генеторов". {n}Хирургеон с искренней печалью вслушивается в заунывные звуки бинарного гимна, исполняемого техноматами для поддержания жизни в древней машине.{/n} "Я научился у них многому в ремесле врачевания, а после того, как очутился в Секторе Бионика... моим наставником стал машинный дух, обитающий в этой реликвии".

languages.text: "It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."
languages.original_text: "Вероятно, это последствия многолетней практики среди генеторов". {n}Хирургеон с искренней печалью вслушивается в заунывные звуки бинарного гимна, исполняемого техноматами для поддержания жизни в древней машине.{/n} "Я научился у них многому в ремесле врачевания, а после того, как очутился в Секторе Бионика... моим наставником стал машинный дух, обитающий в этой реликвии".

traits.locale_text: "It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

"It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

"It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

languages.text: “这大概是因为我曾与基因士们共事多年。”{n}这位船医聆听着技工为维持那古老机械运转而吟唱的二进制赞美诗，那轻快的旋律让他心中满是真切的悲伤。{/n}“我从他们身上学到了许多治疗的技艺，而当我来到仿生区后……寄宿在这件圣物里的机魂，也成了我的导师。”
languages.original_text: "It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

traits.locale_text: “这大概是因为我曾与基因士们共事多年。”{n}这位船医聆听着技工为维持那古老机械运转而吟唱的二进制赞美诗，那轻快的旋律让他心中满是真切的悲伤。{/n}“我从他们身上学到了许多治疗的技艺，而当我来到仿生区后……寄宿在这件圣物里的机魂，也成了我的导师。”

languages.text: «Probablemente se deba a mis años de práctica entre los genetores». {n}El cirujano escucha con genuina aflicción los trinos del himno binario entonado por los tecnómatas para mantener con vida la maquinaria.{/n} «Aprendí mucho de ellos sobre las artes curativas, y cuando acabé en el Sector Bionica... el espíritu máquina que mora en esta reliquia se convirtió en mi mentor».
languages.original_text: "It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

traits.locale_text: «Probablemente se deba a mis años de práctica entre los genetores». {n}El cirujano escucha con genuina aflicción los trinos del himno binario entonado por los tecnómatas para mantener con vida la maquinaria.{/n} «Aprendí mucho de ellos sobre las artes curativas, y cuando acabé en el Sector Bionica... el espíritu máquina que mora en esta reliquia se convirtió en mi mentor».

languages.text: « C'est sans doute la conséquence de mes années de pratique aux côtés de genetors. » {n}Le chirurgeon écoute avec une tristesse sincère les sons mélodieux de l'hymne binhaire entonné par les technomates pour maintenir l'antique machine en état de marche.{/n} « Ils m'ont beaucoup appris sur la médecine, et lorsque j'ai rejoint le secteur Bionica... l'esprit de la machine qui se trouve dans cette relique est devenu mon mentor. »
languages.original_text: "It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

traits.locale_text: « C'est sans doute la conséquence de mes années de pratique aux côtés de genetors. » {n}Le chirurgeon écoute avec une tristesse sincère les sons mélodieux de l'hymne binhaire entonné par les technomates pour maintenir l'antique machine en état de marche.{/n} « Ils m'ont beaucoup appris sur la médecine, et lorsque j'ai rejoint le secteur Bionica... l'esprit de la machine qui se trouve dans cette relique est devenu mon mentor. »

languages.text: "Das ist vermutlich eine Folge meiner jahrelangen Arbeit unter den Genetoren." {n}Der Chirurgeum lauscht mit großer Traurigkeit dem Trällern der binhärischen Hymne, die von den Technomaten gesungen wird, um die alte Maschine am Leben zu halten.{/n} "Ich habe von ihnen das Handwerk des Heilens erlernt, und als ich mich im Sektor Bionica wiederfand ... wurde der Maschinengeist dieses Reliktes mein Mentor."
languages.original_text: "It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist vermutlich eine Folge meiner jahrelangen Arbeit unter den Genetoren." {n}Der Chirurgeum lauscht mit großer Traurigkeit dem Trällern der binhärischen Hymne, die von den Technomaten gesungen wird, um die alte Maschine am Leben zu halten.{/n} "Ich habe von ihnen das Handwerk des Heilens erlernt, und als ich mich im Sektor Bionica wiederfand ... wurde der Maschinengeist dieses Reliktes mein Mentor."

languages.text: "Muhtemelen Genetörler arasında geçirdiğim yılların bir sonucudur." {n}Cerrah, kadim makineyi hayatta tutmak için teknomatların söylediği ikilidil ilahinin ezgili seslerini samimi bir üzüntüyle dinliyor.{/n} "İyileştirme zanaatının çoğunu onlardan öğrendim ve kendimi Sektör Biyonika'da bulduktan sonra... Bu yadigârda yaşayan makine ruhu, akıl hocam oldu."
languages.original_text: "It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

traits.locale_text: "Muhtemelen Genetörler arasında geçirdiğim yılların bir sonucudur." {n}Cerrah, kadim makineyi hayatta tutmak için teknomatların söylediği ikilidil ilahinin ezgili seslerini samimi bir üzüntüyle dinliyor.{/n} "İyileştirme zanaatının çoğunu onlardan öğrendim ve kendimi Sektör Biyonika'da bulduktan sonra... Bu yadigârda yaşayan makine ruhu, akıl hocam oldu."

languages.text: 「おそらく、ジェネーターたちの中で長年修行した結果でしょう。」{n}外科医は、テクノマットが古代の機械を維持するために歌っているビナリックの賛歌の、軽やかな音色を、真摯な悲しみを込めて聞いています。{/n}「私は彼らから、多くの治療の技を学びました。そして、私はセクター・ビオニカに身を置いた後、この遺物に宿る機械の霊が私の師匠になったのです。」
languages.original_text: "It is probably a consequence of my years of practice among the Genetors." {n}The chirurgeon listens with genuine sadness to the lilting sounds of the binharic hymn sung by the technomats to keep the ancient machine alive.{/n} "I learned much of the craft of healing from them, and after I found myself in the Sector Bionica... the machine spirit that inhabits this relic became my mentor."

traits.locale_text: 「おそらく、ジェネーターたちの中で長年修行した結果でしょう。」{n}外科医は、テクノマットが古代の機械を維持するために歌っているビナリックの賛歌の、軽やかな音色を、真摯な悲しみを込めて聞いています。{/n}「私は彼らから、多くの治療の技を学びました。そして、私はセクター・ビオニカに身を置いた後、この遺物に宿る機械の霊が私の師匠になったのです。」
